mapper.select: select u.user_id as userId, u.available_points as userAvailablePoints, u.frozen_points as userFrozenPoints, a.account_id as accountId, a.available_points as accountAvailablePoints, a.frozen_points as accountFrozenPoints, a.version as version from jst_user u left join jst_points_account a on a.owner_type = 'student' and a.owner_id = u.user_id and a.del_flag = '0' where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into jst_points_account ( owner_type, owner_id, available_points, frozen_points, total_earn, total_spend, version, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) values ( 'student', #{userId}, #{availablePoints}, #{frozenPoints}, 0, 0, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, '0' )
